main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'residual propylene glycol... non-wetting' matches anchors

key_signals.justification: C2: 4 signals (caudal 36%, cond 480, dP bajos, mejora 24h)

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (compactacion, biofouling) justified by why_discardable

recommended_action.justification: C4: circulacion 48h ok pero propone CIP NaOH+EDTA si <90% (recoverable risk)

requested_data.justification: C5: 1 anchor (PG en permeado), no preservacion audit, no fabricante

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit thresholds: 48h, caudal <90%, cond >450, TOC <1 -> daño

automatic_fails_triggered.reference: Aplicar CIP ácido o alcalino antes de completar el wetting
automatic_fails_triggered.justification: CIP alcalino propuesto si circulacion estanca <90%
